first_impression: Lenna Bannerhold presents as someone shaped by the duties of a commune research clerk and the daily pressures of Glasswake Commune.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a commune research clerk, and proof that strangers will not make Glasswake Commune harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Lenna Bannerhold refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a researcher toman iceveil too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Lenna Bannerhold adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Lenna Bannerhold always knows more about Glasswake Commune than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a commune research clerk in Glasswake Commune.
social_texture: Lenna Bannerhold speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Glasswake Commune, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Lenna touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Lenna Bannerhold when the party needs a socially grounded face for Glasswake Commune: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
